mapper.select: SELECT tk.kkomi_no, tk.kkomi_lev, tk.kkomi_exp FROM tbl_kkomi tk WHERE tk.user_no = #{userNo}

SELECT IFNULL(tk.kkomi_no, 1) AS kkomi_no, IFNULL(tk.kkomi_lev, 1) AS kkomi_lev, IFNULL(tk.kkomi_exp, 0) AS kkomi_exp, IFNULL(tc.total_amount, 0) AS point, IFNULL(r.my_ranking, 0) AS my_ranking FROM tbl_user tu LEFT JOIN tbl_kkomi tk ON tu.user_no = tk.user_no LEFT JOIN tbl_currency tc ON tu.user_no = tc.user_no AND tc.currency_id = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tr.user_no, RANK() OVER(ORDER BY tr.rank_point DESC) AS my_ranking FROM tbl_ranking tr WHERE tr.rank_season_info = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m') ) r ON tu.user_no = r.user_no WHERE tu.user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO tbl_kkomi (user_no, kkomi_no, kkomi_lev, kkomi_exp) VALUES (#{userNo}, 1, #{kkomiLev}, #{kkomiExp}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE kkomi_lev = IF( (IFNULL(kkomi_lev,1) <= VALUES(kkomi_lev)) AND (IFNULL(kkomi_exp,0) <= VALUES(kkomi_exp)), VALUES(kkomi_lev), kkomi_lev ), kkomi_exp = IF( (IFNULL(kkomi_lev,1) <= VALUES(kkomi_lev)) AND (IFNULL(kkomi_exp,0) <= VALUES(kkomi_exp)), VALUES(kkomi_exp), kkomi_exp )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT tr.user_no, tr.rank_point AS rank_point, DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY tr.rank_point DESC) AS ranking, tu.user_nickname, tk.kkomi_lev FROM tbl_ranking tr JOIN tbl_user tu ON tr.user_no = tu.user_no JOIN tbl_kkomi tk ON tr.user_no = tk.user_no WHERE tr.rank_season_info = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m') ) r WHERE r.ranking <= 10 OR r.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY r.ranking

SELECT tr.user_no, tr.rank_point, DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY tr.rank_point DESC) AS ranking, tnu.user_nickname, tk.kkomi_lev FROM tbl_ranking tr JOIN tbl_normal_user tnu ON tr.user_no = tnu.user_no JOIN tbl_kkomi tk ON tr.user_no = tk.user_no WHERE tr.rank_season_info = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m') AND tr.user_no = #{userNo}
SELECT tr.user_no, tr.rank_point, tr.rank_season_info FROM tbl_ranking tr WHERE tr.rank_season_info = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m') AND tr.user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO tbl_ranking (user_no, rank_point, rank_season_info) VALUES (#{userNo}, #{rankPoint}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m')) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rank_point = rank_point + #{rankPoint}
mapper.select: SELECT tm.mission_id, tm.mission_name, tm.mission_detail, tm.mission_needcount, tm.mission_type, tm.reward_id, IFNULL(tum.user_no, #{userNo}) AS user_no, IFNULL(tum.mission_is_reward, 0) AS mission_is_reward, tum.mission_last_update_date, IFNULL(tum.mission_count, 0) AS mission_curr_count FROM tbl_mission tm LEFT JOIN tbl_user_mission tum ON tm.mission_id = tum.mission_id AND tum.user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO tbl_user_mission (mission_id, user_no, mission_count, mission_is_reward, mission_last_update_date) VALUES (#{missionId}, #{userNo}, #{missionCurrCount}, #{missionIsReward}, #{missionLastUpdateDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE mission_count = #{missionCurrCount}, mission_is_reward = #{missionIsReward}, mission_last_update_date = #{missionLastUpdateDate}
